fields.name: subjectId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the data subject.
fields.synonyms: data subject ID, identifier, user ID

fields.name: targetEntity
fields.description: The entity or system affected by the erasure request.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state of the erasure request.

fields.name: requestedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the erasure request was initially submitted.
fields.synonyms: submission time, creation time, request date

fields.name: executesAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the erasure process completed.
fields.synonyms: completion time, finish time, end time

fields.name: executedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the erasure process completed.
fields.synonyms: completion time, finish time, end time

fields.name: cancelledAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the erasure request was cancelled.
fields.synonyms: cancellation time, cancelled timestamp, cancel date

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-form text providing additional information or context.

events.name: CANCEL_ERASURE
events.description: Signals a request cancellation during its processing lifecycle.

events.name: ErasureLoaded
events.description: Indicates that erasure request data has been successfully loaded.

events.name: ErasureLoadFailed
events.description: Indicates failure to load erasure request data.
events.synonyms: load error, failed load, data error

events.name: ErasureSaved
events.description: Indicates a new erasure request has been successfully saved.

events.name: ErasureSaveFailed
events.description: Indicates that saving the erasure request failed.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Mode
overridableConfigKeys.description: anonymize = scrub piiFields and retain row for audit. delete = remove the row entirely.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Enabled
overridableConfigKeys.description: Whether the data-erasure workflow is active for the host orbital. Off by default; turn on to handle GDPR right-to-be-forgotten requests.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: enable, turn on, enforce, require, activate, apply, switch on, gdpr, erasure, right to be forgotten, data deletion, scheduled deletion, retention purge, account deletion, anonymize user data, scrub PII, delete user data

overridableConfigKeys.label: Grace period (days)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Days between request and execution. Customer can CANCEL during this window. Default 30 days matches typical GDPR practice.

overridableConfigKeys.label: PII fields to scrub
overridableConfigKeys.description: Fields the target atom should null when anonymizeVsDelete='anonymize'.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the data table rendered by this atom.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Target entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity name whose records erasure requests apply to (e.g. 'CustomerAccount').
